2.title: Cloud Integration
2.description: Run your agents 24/7 in the cloud and stream their work back to your desktop in real time.

3.title: Web App
3.description: A web companion for accounts, billing, and managing agents from any browser.

4.description: Full multi-language support, including right-to-left layouts and language-specific fonts.

6.description: Build agents together with your team — shared spaces, role permissions, and live dashboards.
